title: membership — model relationships
description: Four owned entities. Membership belongs to Tenant + Region + Branch + Athlete + MembershipPlan directly + optional AthleteGuardian + Coupon + TaxCalculation. MembershipPlan belongs to Tenant + Branch + optional AgeGroup. MembershipRenewal belongs to Tenant + Membership + optional Invoice + optional Coupon. Pass belongs to Tenant + Membership + optional Session. None carry `application_id` / `organization_id` / `scope_node_id` — forbidden columns. Cascades organization + application through the belongs-to chain.

outbound.description: Commercial + regulatory zone. Drives currency + tax rules. Per hierarchy §14 belongs-to matrix.
The athlete the membership entitles. RESTRICT — athletes cannot be archived while active memberships reference them.
The AthleteGuardian responsible for payment. Nullable — memberships for adult athletes have no guardian. When the guardian relationship terminates, set null (admin notified).
Coupon redeemed at signing. RESTRICT — coupons cannot be hard-deleted while memberships reference their redemption (audit trail).
Tax calculation at signing. RESTRICT — cannot be deleted while memberships reference it.
Plans belong to ONE branch. Cross-branch offering requires duplicating the plan.
RESTRICT — memberships cannot be hard-deleted while renewal audit rows reference them. Financial retention outlives the membership.
Wave 4.5+ — the invoice for this renewal period.

examples: invoice::Invoice — carries membership_id back-reference on the invoice side (atomic invoice creation)
transaction::Transaction — carries membership_id for payment records
inbound.onDelete: RESTRICT by convention on domain FKs referencing memberships.id; PurgeMembershipDataForErasedTenant coordinates cascade order for TenantErased.

accessor_chain.description: The Membership model delegates presentation accessors to its aggregates.

Membership.requires_renewal_soon: status = 'active' AND next_renewal_at IS NOT NULL AND next_renewal_at BETWEEN now() AND now() + 7 days

MembershipPlan.carries_addons: addon_config IS NOT NULL AND addon_config != '{}'

Pass.is_available: consumed_at IS NULL AND now() BETWEEN valid_from AND valid_until AND refunded_at IS NULL
Pass.is_expired: consumed_at IS NULL AND now() > valid_until
Pass.is_consumed: consumed_at IS NOT NULL AND refunded_at IS NULL

notes: Membership carries `application_id` INDIRECTLY via its Tenant.
Cascades organization + application through tenant → application.
region_id + branch_id + athlete_id + membership_plan_id + tenant_id + billing_interval + currency + price_snapshot_cents + coupon_snapshot + tax_calculation_snapshot are IMMUTABLE post-create.
Plan changes (upgrade/downgrade) create a NEW Membership row + terminate the old — never mutate membership_plan_id in place.
